About Me

Liner Notes

LINER NOTES CAT. NO. WM-001

I'm a creative designer & developer with a passion for building bold, immersive digital experiences. I believe great design should feel effortless — with smooth animations that delight at every turn.

With 5+ years crafting for startups and global brands, I blend aesthetic precision with technical depth. From pixel-perfect UI to WebGL experiments, I make the web feel alive.

Produced by Creative Studio
Recorded in The Browser
